_provenance.QUIRK: category=['SIYASET','EKONOMI'] did NOT strictly filter — the response mixed SIRKET/KAP, GENEL, and EKONOMI items. The build agent must not assume the category param hard-filters; filter client-side after fetch if strict categories are needed for the event engine.

_golden_master.backs: M6 geopolitical event engine — the raw news/KAP feed shape (id, headline, date, timestamp, source[], category[], symbol[], isFlash). Sources span KAP / MATRIKS / AA / REUTERS.
notes: KAP filings arrive here too (e.g. 'Sirket Genel Bilgi Formu', 'Ozel Durum Aciklamasi') — same feed the v1 KAP layer reads, now timestamped.
A 'BISTECH Devre Kesici Uygulamasi' (circuit-breaker) KAP item appears (symbol YAYLA) — relevant to limit-lock/halt detection (M1).
A geopolitical headline (Trump/Iran) tagged GENEL is the kind of SIYASET/DUNYA item the event taxonomy must classify.
timestamp is epoch-ms; date is YYYY-MM-DD.
